mapper.insert: INSERT INTO missions (id, family_id, title, description, default_points, icon_type, is_active, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{familyId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{title}, #{description}, #{defaultPoints}, #{iconType}, #{isActive}, #{createdBy, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, family_id, title, description, default_points, icon_type, is_active, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM missions WHERE family_id = #{familyId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, family_id, title, description, default_points, icon_type, is_active, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM missions WHERE family_id = #{familyId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} AND is_active = TRUE ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE missions SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, default_points = #{defaultPoints}, icon_type = #{iconType}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM missions WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}
